response.original_title: The Faggots & Their Friends Between Revolutions
response.overview: A poetic cinematic envisioning of the legendary queer 1970s manifesto, The Faggots & Their Friends Between Revolutions, this visual meditation constrasts nature’s quiet strength with the rigid architecture of power. In a world where the faggots and their friends are made of flowers, trees and softness, will they survive against the men of concrete and steel? A story of otherness not as weakness, but as enduring, blooming power.
response.title: The Faggots & Their Friends Between Revolutions
